description: Creates a histogram visualization from table data. Requires a stattable reference. Supports density normalization and column selection for categories and values.
utility: Create a histogram from table data

arguments.name: xColumn
arguments.description: Category column index (default: 1). Optionally accepts a title: xcol(1, "Category")

arguments.name: valueColumn
arguments.description: Value column index (default: 2). Optionally accepts a title: col(2, "Frequency")

examples.expression:
T = stattable(at(4,4), view(8,12), values(10, 20, 15, 25, 30, 18, 22))
H = histogram(at(14,4), view(10,16), T)

T = stattable(at(4,4), view(8,12), values(10, 20, 15, 25, 30, 18, 22))
H = histogram(at(14,4), view(10,16), T, type(density))

T = stattable(at(4,4), view(8,12), values(10, 20, 15, 25, 30, 18, 22))
H = histogram(at(14,4), view(10,16), T, xcol(1), col(2))
